creator: jwagner@graffadmin.com
text:
BINGO!  Found the following patch for converters/p5-Convert-UUlib and it 
eliminated amavisd-new dying.  Mail is being delivered correctly, at 
least for right now.  I'm going to monitor and will report back if it 
recurs.

http://www.freshports.org/commit.php?category=converters&port=p5-Convert-UUlib&files=yes&message_id=200909141155.n8EBtaEH098138@repoman.freebsd.org

Jim


PS - I was full of crap on the stuck messages being only for users on my 
box; it was affecting others as well, though not nearly as many as on my 
machine.  (All but two of the stuck messages were for accounts on my 
server.)  Don't know if it makes any difference now, but wanted to 
include this in case it's relevant for troubleshooting.
